bio: Mango is a gentle, cuddly boy who is almost one year old. He arrived in Cluster O at just 12 weeks old and quickly charmed the ladies at a local salon, winning them over with his sweet, affectionate nature. As the original of the 'fruit salad' gang, he is incredibly kind with the newbies, especially Cherry. He now spends his days curled up in his cosy salon bed, soaking up love and attention, before heading out in the evenings to be with his friends. While he's happy with this routine, Mango would truly love a home where he can enjoy the same comfort and safety at night too. He would be the perfect fit for a loving family.
location: Behind the bushes, down from Carrefour Cluster P
